creator: alane@geeksrus.net
text:
KPilot port is obsolete. For KDE-1.x. KPilot 4.x is integrated into kdepim.

Fix: Patch to add kpilot to kdepim build. Note that this raises some issues with
the way bsd.kde.mk is set up. I'll address those in another PR, but the basic
idea is that it is difficult and non-intuitive to add extra include or library
paths to the configure step.

---8<-snip---8<-snip---8<-snip---8<-snip---8<-snip---8<-snip---8<---
How-To-Repeat: N/A
